scripts.prebuild: python3 scripts/generate-og.py || echo 'OG generation skipped (needs macOS fonts) — committed copies in public/og are used'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && env -u CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN wrangler deploy && node scripts/submit-indexnow.mjs
scripts.deploy:pages-legacy: npm run build && env -u CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=the-lay-counselor-academy --commit-dirty=true && node scripts/submit-indexnow.mjs
